chunks.text: One day during summer vacation, my family visited my grandfather 's small farm.
The country air was very clear.
A cow was looking at us with big eyes.
A pig was moving its nose behind the fence.
A sheep was eating grass with soft white hair.
When we walked toward the hill behind the house
a small rabbit appeared from the bushes.
For a short moment, our eyes met, and then it quickly turned and ran away.
Above the trees, birds were flying freely, and from time to time
one bird came down low to look at us.
Beside a little stream, a small frog jumped.
I thought I saw a big bear in the shadow of the far mountain.
“ There are many wild animals here,” my grandfather said quietly.
Behind the barn, a horse was eating grass calmly.
At night, we can hear the small footsteps of a mouse, too.
In the little stream nearby, we saw small fish swimming.
“ Not only cats and dogs in our town have lives,” my father quietly added.
